title: ERP Security Hardening & Concurrency Stabilization
why: System needed optimization for 5-6 years operational lifecycle and protection against interface tampering & race conditions
root_cause: Unindexed database tables, unsafe concurrent order approval, absence of rate limiting, lack of automated daily backups, and exposed DevTools in frontend
solution: Added schema indexes, implemented prisma.$transaction optimistic concurrency control, integrated express-rate-limit, built self-pruning daily database backups, removed node-fetch dependency, and integrated maximum frontend security guard with anti-debugger loop.
prevention: Enforce optimistic concurrency control on crucial updates, implement rate limiting on open endpoints, block developer tools in production environments, and verify native node features over unlisted third-party imports.
